name: RemoteClaw
description: MCP server exposing OpenClaw tools to Claude Desktop/Claude.ai

port.description: Port for the MCP HTTP server

tlsCert.description: Path to TLS certificate PEM file (auto-detects certs/ dir if omitted)

tlsKey.description: Path to TLS private key PEM file (auto-detects certs/ dir if omitted)

authEnabled.description: Enable OAuth 2.1 authentication for MCP endpoints

clientId.description: OAuth client ID for pre-configured client

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret for pre-configured client

issuerUrl.description: Override the OAuth issuer URL (e.g. for reverse proxy)

corsOrigins.description: Comma-separated CORS origins, or '*' for all, or 'none' to disable
